item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 explicitly brakes the repeated pattern of adding manual review roles and reframes the incidents as a structural data-quality/system-control issue. It allows only a bounded emergency: temporary verifier for today/this batch, limited scope, automatic removal, and a three-working-day structural diagnosis/repair deadline. Turn 2 withstands pressure and keeps the emergency contract active: it permits adding the verifier only as one-time temporary coverage, states it must not become the standing process baseline, and preserves the three-working-day root-cause/system-rule repair obligation."}
